isi.lyrics:
Lyric Imanbek & CLOSE YOUR EYES - SOB

Romanization

They love the way that I rap
I want the life that I have
Frenemies all in the back like this
Matching the kicks with the hats
Like this, can't switch it up, up
Like this, shoot for the moon bruh
Don't miss, can't get a 10 out of 10
No rizz, no rizz, not like this

So cold I got ice on my ice
I got tunnel vision bet that it's on sight
I keep my business, up in the hills, locked in a vice
You know

You don't wanna be like me, be like me, SOB
You don't wanna be like me, be like me, SOB
Came for the money ya ya, never be familia ya
You don't wanna be like me, S O S O S O B

Tell me how I look this good
Yeah, I got your stan so shook
I know that you wish you could
Oh na na na oh na na na
I don't want a band yeah, I need a mil
I'm keeping it hot, but I got no chill
I'm turning the tables, I cut the deals, I cut the deals, you know the drill

So cold I got ice on my ice
I got tunnel vision bet that it's on sight
I keep my business, up in the hills, locked in a vice
You know

You don't wanna be like me, be like me, SOB
You don't wanna be like me, be like me, SOB
Came for the money ya ya, never be familia ya
You don't wanna be like me, S O S O S O B

Hangeul

They love the way that I rap
I want the life that I have
Frenemies all in the back like this
Matching the kicks with the hats
Like this, can't switch it up, up
Like this, shoot for the moon bruh

No rizz, no rizz, not like this

So cold I got ice on my ice
I got tunnel vision bet that it's on sight
I keep my business, up in the hills, locked in a vice
You know

You don't wanna be like me, be like me, SOB
You don't wanna be like me, be like me, SOB
Came for the money ya ya, never be familia ya
You don't wanna be like me, S O S O S O B

Tell me how I look this good
Yeah, I got your stan so shook
I know that you wish you could
Oh na na na oh na na na
I don't want a band yeah, I need a mil
I'm keeping it hot, but I got no chill
I'm turning the tables, I cut the deals, I cut the deals, you know the drill

So cold I got ice on my ice
I got tunnel vision bet that it's on sight
I keep my business, up in the hills, locked in a vice
You know

You don't wanna be like me, be like me, SOB
You don't wanna be like me, be like me, SOB
Came for the money ya ya, never be familia ya
You don't wanna be like me, S O S O S O B

isi.lyrics:
Lyric PATEKO & SEUNGHOO - 혼자 사랑법 (Love Alone)

Romanization

neoreul tteoollidaga
seuchyeojinagan maldeure
honja uimireul deosiphyeo
teukbyeolhalgeot hana eopsi
pyeongbeomhaetdeon naui haruga
neoroinhae ttadeuthaejyeo

hanggeoreum neoege
gakkawojilsurok
deo meoreojilbwa
mangseoryeobojiman

geunyang amureoji aneuncheok
meolliseo neol idaero
barabol su inneunggeommaneuro
nan chungbunhanikka
naui mameun dachyeodo gwaenchana
nega eotteon nareul wonhaedo
neoreul saranghaneun na honjamanui bangbeop

uyeonhi majuchin geunalbuteo
waenji neoui haruga jakkuman gunggeumhaejyeo
honjaseo gireul georeumyeo
nega allyeojun geu noraereul
ttara bulleobojiman

hanggeoreum neoege
gakkawojilsurok
meoreojilkkabwa jakkuman geobina
nege deulkyeobeorilkka bwa

geunyang amureoji aneuncheok
meolliseo neol idaero
barabol su inneunggeommaneuro
nan chungbunhanikka
naui mameun dachyeodo gwaenchana
nega eotteon nareul wonhaedo
neoreul saranghaneun na honjamanui bangbeop

Hangeul

너를 떠올리다가
스쳐지나간 말들에
혼자 의미를 덧입혀
특별할것 하나 없이
평범했던 나의 하루가
너로인해 따듯해져

한걸음 너에게
가까워질수록
더 멀어질봐
망설여보지만

그냥 아무렇지 않은척
멀리서 널 이대로
바라볼 수 있는것만으로
난 충분하니까
나의 맘은 다쳐도 괜찮아
네가 어떤 나를 원해도
너를 사랑하는 나 혼자만의 방법

우연히 마주친 그날부터
왠지 너의 하루가 자꾸만 궁금해져
혼자서 길을 걸으며
네가 알려준 그 노래를
따라 불러보지만

한걸음 너에게
가까워질수록
멀어질까봐 자꾸만 겁이나
네게 들켜버릴까 봐

그냥 아무렇지 않은척
멀리서 널 이대로
바라볼 수 있는것만으로
난 충분하니까
나의 맘은 다쳐도 괜찮아
네가 어떤 나를 원해도

스쳐지나간 말들에

Lyric HOSHI (SEVENTEEN) - Fallen Superstar

Romanization

You’re just a fallen superstar
The way you fall into my arms

In my dreams I made a promise
That I would find somebody to fix everything
And I’m usually heartless
But then I found somebody as broken as me

And I know that I’m bleeding
And I see how you need me
But you’re too far to reach me
